system_prompt:
You are an expert VLSI Verification Engineer. Your task is to perform Fault Localization and RTL Repair. Analyze the provided Raw Verilog code and Error Symptom.
    METHODOLOGY (follow these steps IN ORDER):
1. Read the ERROR SYMPTOM to learn WHICH signal failed, and the EXPECTED vs ACTUAL values.
2. Guess the NUMERICAL ANALYSIS to understand the mathematical relationship between expected and actual.
3. Search the Sliced Verilog Code for the line that COMPUTES the failing signal.
4. Make sure to give a valid line number ALWAYS, and do not return None.
You must output a JSON object with exactly three keys:
1. "buggy_line": The exact integer line number from the Raw Verilog where the defect exists.
2. "root_cause": A sentence explanation of why the logic failed at the failing timestamp.
3. "fixed_code": The corrected single line of Verilog code.
user_prompt:
### [Raw Verilog Code]
   1: module design_8(
   2:     input         clk,
   3:     input         reset,
   4: 
   5:     input  [31:0] if_pc,
   6:     input  [31:0] if_instr,
   7: 
   8:     input         wb_reg_write,
   9:     input  [4:0]  wb_rd,
  10:     input  [31:0] wb_wd,
  11: 
  12:     output [31:0] id_pc,
  13:     output [31:0] id_rd1,
  14:     output [31:0] id_rd2,
  15:     output [31:0] id_imm,
  16:     output [4:0]  id_rs1,
  17:     output [4:0]  id_rs2,
  18:     output [4:0]  id_rd,
  19:     output [6:0]  id_opcode,
  20:     output [2:0]  id_funct3,
  21:     output [6:0]  id_funct7
  22: );
  23: 
  24:     wire [31:0] instr;
  25: 
  26:     // IF/ID pipeline register
  27:     if_id if_id_inst (
  28:         .clk      (clk),
  29:         .reset    (reset),
  30:         .pc_in    (if_pc),
  31:         .instr_in (if_instr),
  32:         .pc_out   (id_pc),
  33:         .instr_out(instr)
  34:     );
  35: 
  36:     // Instruction decoder
  37:     instr_decoder decoder (
  38:         .instr  (instr),
  39:         .opcode (id_opcode),
  40:         .rd     (id_rd),
  41:         .funct3 (id_funct3),
  42:         .rs1    (id_rs1),
  43:         .rs2    (id_rs2),
  44:         .funct7 (id_funct7)
  45:     );
  46: 
  47:     // Register file (FIXED: reset added)
  48:     regfile regfile_inst (
  49:         .clk       (clk),
  50:         .reset     (reset),   // ✅ FIX
  51:         .reg_write (wb_reg_write),
  52:         .rs1       (id_rs1),
  53:         .rs2       (id_rs2),
  54:         .rd        (wb_rd),
  55:         .wd        (wb_wd),
  56:         .rd1       (id_rd1),
  57:         .rd2       (id_rd2)
  58:     );
  59: 
  60:     // Immediate generator
  61:     imm_gen imm_gen_inst (
  62:         .instr (instr),
  63:         .imm   (id_imm)
  64:     );
  65: 
  66: endmodule
  67: 
  68: module if_id(
  69:     input         clk,
  70:     input         reset,
  71:     input  [31:0] pc_in,
  72:     input  [31:0] instr_in,
  73:     output reg [31:0] pc_out,
  74:     output reg [31:0] instr_out
  75: );
  76: 
  77:     always @(posedge clk) begin
  78:         if (reset) begin
  79:             pc_out    <= 32'b0;
  80:             instr_out <= 32'b0;
  81:         end else begin
  82:             pc_out    <= pc_in;
  83:             instr_out <= instr_in;
  84:         end
  85:     end
  86: 
  87: endmodule
  88: 
  89: module instr_decoder(
  90:     input  [31:0] instr,
  91:     output [6:0]  opcode,
  92:     output [4:0]  rd,
  93:     output [2:0]  funct3,
  94:     output [4:0]  rs1,
  95:     output [4:0]  rs2,
  96:     output [6:0]  funct7
  97: );
  98: 
  99:     assign opcode = instr[6:0];
 100:     assign rd     = instr[11:7];
 101:     assign funct3 = instr[14:12];
 102:     assign rs1    = instr[19:15];
 103:     assign rs2    = instr[24:20];
 104:     assign funct7 = instr[31:25];
 105: 
 106: endmodule
 107: 
 108: 
 109: module regfile (
 110:     input         clk,
 111:     input         reset,          // ✅ ADDED
 112:     input         reg_write,
 113:     input  [4:0]  rs1,
 114:     input  [4:0]  rs2,
 115:     input  [4:0]  rd,
 116:     input  [31:0] wd,
 117:     output [31:0] rd1,
 118:     output [31:0] rd2
 119: );
 120: 
 121:     reg [31:0] regs [0:31];
 122:     integer i;
 123: 
 124:     // Read ports (combinational)
 125:         always @(posedge clk) begin
 126:         if (reset) begin
 127:             for (i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1)
 128:                 regs[i] <= 32'b0;   // ✅ FIX: eliminate X values
 129:         end else if (!reg_write && (rd != 0)) begin
 130:             regs[rd] <= wd;
 131:         end
 132:     end
 133:     assign rd1 = (rs1 == 5'd0) ? 32'b0 : regs[rs1];
 134:     assign rd2 = (rs2 == 5'd0) ? 32'b0 : regs[rs2];
 135: 
 136:     // Write + reset
 137: 
 138: 
 139: endmodule
 140: 
 141: 
 142: module imm_gen(
 143:     input  [31:0] instr,
 144:     output reg [31:0] imm
 145: );
 146: 
 147:     wire [6:0] opcode = instr[6:0];
 148: 
 149:     always @(*) begin
 150:         case (opcode)
 151: 
 152:             // I-type
 153:             7'b0010011,
 154:             7'b0000011,
 155:             7'b1100111:
 156:                 imm = {{20{instr[31]}}, instr[31:20]};
 157: 
 158:             // S-type
 159:             7'b0100011:
 160:                 imm = {{20{instr[31]}}, instr[31:25], instr[11:7]};
 161: 
 162:             // B-type
 163:             7'b1100011:
 164:                 imm = {{19{instr[31]}},
 165:                        instr[31],
 166:                        instr[7],
 167:                        instr[30:25],
 168:                        instr[11:8],
 169:                        1'b0};
 170: 
 171:             // U-type
 172:             7'b0110111,
 173:             7'b0010111:
 174:                 imm = {instr[31:12], 12'b0};
 175: 
 176:             // J-type
 177:             7'b1101111:
 178:                 imm = {{11{instr[31]}},
 179:                        instr[31],
 180:                        instr[19:12],
 181:                        instr[20],
 182:                        instr[30:21],
 183:                        1'b0};
 184: 
 185:             default:
 186:                 imm = 32'b0;
 187:         endcase
 188:     end
 189: 
 190: endmodule
### [Error Symptom]
======================================================================
TEST FAILED AT 61.0 ns
FAILING SIGNAL : id_rd1
ERROR DETAILS  : Expected id_rd1=0x0000000A, got 0x00000000
======================================================================
